item.title: You are an artist - let your colors show.
You have a good head for matters of the heart.
There is no doubt that you will lead a good life.
You don't need to travel far to find the satisfaction you're looking for.
A new outlook will mean sunny skies ahead.
You may have a fantastic opportunity soon - be open to it.
Be bold, try something new.
You have a contagious exuberance for life.
You bring out the best in others.
You shall attain great wisdom with each passing year.
You hold the key to success.
Today's your lucky day.
Any doubts you have will soon disappear.
Truth will be your biggest ally this month.
You will soon be rewarded for your best efforts.
Your effortless humor will help someone in need.
You are destined for success and happiness.
A surprise gift will leave a lasting impression.
You take criticism as an opportunity to grow.
You will make a change for the better.
A stranger's kindness will surprise and delight you.
item.dc:creator: uzer

item.title: You are admired by many.
item.dc:creator: uzer

item.title: A friends advice is invaluable.
item.dc:creator: uzer

item.title: You will be rewarded for your patience and understanding.
An admirer is concealing affection for you.
You have the makings of a leader - take charge.
Your dream will come true when you least expect it.
You are surrounded by unlimited opportunities.
You will have good luck in your personal affairs.
Address the elephant in the room.
Others are inspired by your courage.
item.dc:creator: uzer

item.title: Avoid unchallenging occupations, they waste your talents.
item.dc:creator: uzer

item.title: Someone is speaking well of you.
item.dc:creator: uzer

item.title: Your keen sense of humor will make you many friends.
item.dc:creator: uzer

item.title: Someone you respect will soon honor you.
item.dc:creator: uzer

item.title: Your biggest battle will be won with the help of others.
item.dc:creator: uzer

item.title: Do not dwell on differences with a loved one - seek common ground.
item.dc:creator: uzer

item.title: Unforeseen financial resources will soon become available to you.
item.dc:creator: uzer

item.title: Be willing to assert yourself in situations of great importance.
item.dc:creator: uzer

item.title: Your sense of humor will get you through difficult times.
item.dc:creator: uzer

item.title: Your courage will guide your future.
item.dc:creator: uzer
